title: paeonia officinalis var. glabra
intro: Paeonia officinalis var. glabra, also known as the smooth peony, is a plant species within the Paeonia genus that is characterized by its smooth stems and leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and anticonvulsant effects. The health benefits of Paeonia officinalis var. glabra include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopause. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
